title: Nutty Gooey Venetian Pecorino Stir-fry
description: A crowd-pleasing Venezuelan dish that combines air-fried pecorino with a nuttiness and gooey texture for a low-fat-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: air fryer basket or sheet pan with parchment paper
ingredients.notes: For air frying, preheat your air fryer to 350°F (175°C)

instructions: Place grated pecorino cheese in a shallow dish.
Add minced garlic and chopped walnuts into the cheese mixture.
Toss well until evenly coated with the cheese mixture.
Spoon some of the cheese mixture onto the air fryer basket or sheet pan lined with parchment paper, making sure to spread it thinly for even cooking.
Meanwhile, slice your red bell pepper and onion thinly, then sauté in a pan with a bit of olive oil until slightly softened.
Gently fold the sautéed vegetables into the cheese mixture before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or as part of a main meal.
